title: Conductor Skill <-> Pipeline Drift Reconciliation
pipeline_rationale: All edits are skill/config/reference/template docs; no production code, no executable test framework. Auto-qualifies for bookkeeping under the Pipeline Selection Policy. Peer-reviewed 2026-07-06: direction approved, revisions required and now applied (5th target file added to backups/dependencies; phase wording aligned to Stage 1 'Final Phase Validation & Handover'; template pipeline_path made a placeholder; test_framework examples broadened; evidence wording corrected; closeout date plain YYYY-MM-DD).

skipped_stages.reason: No production code; docs/config only - peer review optional.
No re-review needed for bookkeeping config reconciliation.
No executable test framework; RED gate n/a.
Re-validation folded into Stage 7 for bookkeeping path.

summary: Close drift between the conductor skill (templates/hygiene) and conductor-pipeline skill (staged execution) introduced when the risk-adjusted pipeline modes were added without updating the conductor skill. Make the metadata template pipeline-compliant, point Stage 1 at the conductor skill as the single source of truth for hygiene, and make both skills pipeline-aware and mutually consistent.
keyOutcomes: track-metadata.template.json de-duped (was duplicated by stale read) + pipeline_path placeholder; all 7 pipeline fields present exactly once
Stage 1 prompt now directs plan-creators to load the conductor skill + Upsert-row ledger wording + dual-ledger + track-ID + 3-state checkboxes
conductor/SKILL.md Completion Gate is pipeline-aware (pipeline_mode/pipeline_path check) + conditional ledger wording + field glossary + conductor-pipeline cross-ref
track-plan.template.md renumbered to Phase 0 / Final Phase + pipeline-consistency checkbox
Bidirectional cross-references between conductor and conductor-pipeline skills
risks: Agent/skill/command config is not hot-reloaded; OpenCode restart required before testing /conductor-pipeline.
Future full-casing normalization of metadata would touch 5+ pipeline stages; consciously deferred here.
A parallel OpenCode session was active 2026-07-06 editing unrelated tracks (skill-junction-unification); ledger upserts are guarded but should coordinate to avoid collisions.
deliverables: Pipeline-compliant track-metadata.template.json (7 pipeline fields; pipeline_path as selected-path placeholder)
Stage 1 prompt directive to load conductor skill + hygiene conventions
Reconciled ledger wording and phase numbering (Final Phase Validation & Handover) across both skills
Updated track-plan.template.md Final Phase + phase numbering
validationCriteria: track-metadata.template.json parses as valid JSON and contains all 7 pipeline field names
pipeline_mode/pipeline_path in the template are a selected-path example/placeholder and validation confirms semantic mode/path consistency (not just presence)
Stage 1 prompt references loading the conductor skill and the Upsert-row ledger convention
conductor/SKILL.md Completion Gate references pipeline_mode/pipeline_path consistency
Both skills agree on ledger-mandatory wording and the exact phase convention (Phase 0 ... Final Phase Validation & Handover)
All 5 target files (including conductor-pipeline/SKILL.md) are backed up before editing
tracks.md and tracks-ledger.md upserted and agree
